resultList.dtldesc: Experience the epitome of luxury living with this grand 3 BHK villa located in the rapidly growing residential hub of Isnapur, Hyderabad. This east-facing triplex villa is meticulously designed to offer a premium lifestyle within a secure, gated community. Spanning three floors (G+2), the property provides an ideal blend of contemporary architecture and functional space, making it a perfect sanctuary for families seeking a sophisticated home away from the city's congestion while maintaining excellent connectivity.::::Property Specifications::::The villa boasts an expansive super built-up area of 2,925 sq. ft, featuring a thoughtfully planned layout that prioritises privacy and ventilation. The residence includes three spacious bedrooms, four modern bathrooms, and two balconies that offer pleasant views of the landscaped surroundings. Additional spaces such as a puja room, a study, a store room, and a dedicated servant room enhance the home's utility. The property is currently under construction, allowing for a fresh start in a brand-new space, and features high-quality flooring options including ceramic tiles, granite, and marble. As an unfurnished unit, it provides a versatile canvas for homeowners to design their dream interiors according to their personal taste.::::Facilities::::Residents of this gated society have access to a spectacular 35,000 sq. ft clubhouse and over 30 modern lifestyle amenities. The project is equipped with essential facilities including a swimming pool, a fully equipped gym, a clubhouse, and a community hall. Practical needs are well-addressed with 24-hour water supply, 100% power back-up, and a dedicated lift. Safety is paramount, with a comprehensive security system including CCTV surveillance and intercom facilities. The property also features a private garden and a terrace, providing ample outdoor space for relaxation and recreation within the safety of a secure perimeter.::::Locality::::Strategically located bang on the Mumbai Highway (NH-65), the property offers unparalleled connectivity via the Outer Ring Road (ORR) Exit 2 and Exit 3. It is situated just 15 minutes from the ORR and approximately 30 to 35 minutes from the Gachibowli IT hub, making it an excellent choice for professionals. The locality is home to reputable educational institutions such as St. Mary's Grammar High School and Maheshwara Engineering College. For shopping and daily needs, VMR Fashion Mall and Aakruti Shopping Mall are within 0.6 km. Healthcare facilities are readily available with Ram Reddy Memorial Hospital and Sri Jagannath Hospital nearby, ensuring that all essential services are just a short drive away.

resultList.dtldesc: Sophisticated Residential Living in a Rapidly Developing Hyderabad Hub::::This elegantly designed apartment offers a refined lifestyle in the burgeoning residential area of Gowdavalli. Situated within a modern residential complex, the property provides a serene retreat from the city's hustle while ensuring seamless connectivity to major employment and transport hubs. The apartment is thoughtfully positioned to capture natural light and ventilation, making it an ideal choice for professionals and small families seeking a balanced urban life. As a newly constructed or well-maintained resale unit in a high-growth corridor, it promises both immediate comfort and long-term value.::::Property Specifications::::The residence spans a super area of 1,020 sq. ft, featuring a highly efficient layout that maximises every inch of living space. It comprises two spacious bedrooms and two well-appointed bathrooms, typically designed with modern western fixtures. The internal configuration includes a welcoming living room and a dedicated dining area, perfect for family interactions. A private balcony attached to the living space offers a quiet corner to enjoy the local surroundings. The kitchen is designed for modern functionality and is often accompanied by a utility area for added convenience. High-quality vitrified flooring is used throughout the home, providing a sleek and durable finish.::::Facilities::::The property is supported by a comprehensive range of facilities designed to enhance the quality of life for its residents. It includes a dedicated covered parking space for vehicles and benefits from a dual water supply system, ensuring consistent availability. A robust power backup system is in place for common areas and lifts, and the building is serviced by high-speed elevators. Security is a top priority, with 24-hour personnel and CCTV monitoring in common areas. Additional amenities often include rain water harvesting and landscaped common areas, reflecting a commitment to sustainable and pleasant community living.::::Locality::::The apartment is located in the thriving neighbourhood of Gowdavalli, a locality that has become increasingly popular due to its proximity to the Outer Ring Road (ORR). The Gowdavalli Railway Station is just a short distance away, providing excellent transit links, and the Hyderabad Engineering College is a prominent landmark in the vicinity. The area is well-served by essential infrastructure, with several reputable schools, healthcare clinics, and local markets within easy reach. Its strategic location offers a smooth commute to the HITEC City and Medchal corridors, making it a perfect residential base for those working in Hyderabad’s tech and industrial sectors.

resultList.dtldesc: Spacious 3 BHK Apartment at Atulyams Trident, Kollur, Hyderabad::::Set within the emerging residential corridor of Kollur, this generously proportioned 3 BHK apartment in the Atulyams Trident project offers a balanced combination of space, connectivity and long-term value. Positioned in a well-planned development near the Outer Ring Road, the property is ideal for homeowners seeking a modern apartment with future-ready infrastructure in a rapidly developing part of Hyderabad.::::Property Specifications::::The apartment forms part of the Atulyams Trident residential complex and features a super built-up area of approximately 2050 sq. ft. It is located on the 7th floor of a nine-storey building and is offered on a resale basis with freehold ownership. The layout comprises three bedrooms, three bathrooms and three balconies, providing ample space and privacy for family living. The apartment is east facing and designed to benefit from natural light and ventilation. Flooring includes a combination of ceramic tiles and vitrified tiles across the living and bedroom areas. The property is currently under construction and includes an additional puja room, adding functional flexibility to the layout. One covered car parking space is allotted to the apartment.::::Facilities::::The building is equipped with three lifts, ensuring convenient vertical movement for residents. Continuous water supply is available, along with a reliable electricity connection characterised by no or rare power cuts. The project has received approval from the Hyderabad Metropolitan Development Authority, reinforcing its regulatory compliance. The apartment overlooks landscaped garden areas as well as the main road, offering a pleasant outlook. The unit is presently unfurnished, allowing buyers to customise interiors according to personal preferences.::::Locality::::Kollur is gaining prominence due to its strategic location between Osman Nagar and Kollur, with easy access to the Outer Ring Road. The Atulyams Trident project lies in the vicinity of Imperia and enjoys smooth connectivity to key employment hubs and upcoming infrastructure developments. The area is well positioned for future appreciation, supported by planned growth, improving road networks and increasing residential demand, making this apartment a sound choice for both end use and long-term investment.
